channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenyan Forex Trader King David Survives Car Accident After Personal Tragedy
item.description: Kenyan forex trader David Mwangi, popularly known as King David, narrowly escaped serious injury after being involved in a car accident on Sunday, April 12, 2026. The accident came just months after t...

item.title: Thunder Bay hospital staff member faces manslaughter charge following patient death
item.description: Police in Thunder Bay, Ontario, have announced that a manslaughter charge has been laid in connection with the recent death of a patient at a local hospital. Authorities have not released the identiti...

item.title: Norway’s Expert Committee Rejects Nuclear Power but Urges Building Knowledge for the Future
item.description: A government-appointed Norwegian Nuclear Committee has unanimously recommended that Norway should not pursue the development of nuclear power at this time. After a year and a half of study involving e...

item.title: Political Killings Task Team Investigates Murder of Emfuleni Accountant
item.description: The Gauteng Political Killings Task Team (PKTT) has taken over the investigation into the brutal murder of Martha Mani Rantsofu, an acting accountant at the Emfuleni Local Municipality who was shot de...

item.title: US-Iran nuclear negotiations in Islamabad end without agreement
item.description: After nearly 21 hours of intensive talks in Islamabad, Pakistan, the US and Iran failed to reach an agreement on nuclear and regional security issues. U.S. Vice President JD Vance announced that Washi...

item.title: Dan Walker faces employment tribunal over bullying and sexism allegations from former Channel 5 News co-host
item.description: BBC television presenter Dan Walker is set to appear before an employment tribunal in London following allegations of bullying made by his former Channel 5 News co-host, Claudia-Liza Vanderpuije. The ...

item.title: Guidance for Parents on Teen Safety at Social Events
item.description: The article discusses the critical need for parents to prepare their teenagers for potential violence at social gatherings. Recent incidents reported in Australian media have highlighted situations wh...

item.title: Former DA federal chair Ivan Meyer exits congress following election loss to Solly Msimanga
item.description: During the Democratic Alliance's recent federal congress, former federal chair Ivan Meyer exited the plenary in apparent frustration after Solly Msimanga was announced as the new federal chairperson. ...

item.title: Kenyan Couples Discuss Financial Transparency in Marriage
item.description: A recent article explores the growing conversation around financial transparency in Kenyan marriages. Drawing on insights from relationship experts like Professor Munene, who credits open communicatio...

item.title: Cameron Young Seizes Lead as Rory McIlroy Falters in Final Round at 2026 Masters
item.description: The final round of the 2026 Masters at Augusta National has delivered dramatic developments as Rory McIlroy's lead evaporated. Cameron Young surged ahead after a stroke of luck on the third hole, with...

item.title: Pope Leo Calls for End to Wars in Impassioned Address
item.description: During a fervent address at St. Peter's Basilica, Pope Leo made a strong appeal to global leaders and citizens alike to end all forms of armed conflict. Emphasizing the human cost of war, he highlight...

item.title: Lessons on Living from Those We Have Lost
item.description: At 66, Susan Marchiori reflects on the profound impact the deaths of many loved ones have had on her life. Over the past nine years, she has lost her husband, mother-in-law, sister, brother, three bro...

item.title: Man faces murder charge following fatal stabbing of student in Primrose Hill
item.description: According to Sky News, a man has been charged with the murder of a university student who was fatally stabbed in Primrose Hill, a well-known area of north London. The incident, which occurred earlier ...

item.title: Albanese outlines potential NDIS reforms and investor tax adjustments ahead of May budget
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has indicated that significant reforms to the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS) and tax breaks for property investors could feature in the upcoming May budget...

item.title: ‘Super Mario Galaxy Movie’ maintains box office lead in North America for second week
item.description: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie continues its remarkable performance at the North American box office, maintaining the number one spot for the second consecutive week. Produced by Universal Pictures and ...

item.title: Financial Impact on Tottenham Hotspur if Relegated to Championship
item.description: Tottenham Hotspur find themselves in serious danger of relegation to the Championship after a 1-0 defeat to Sunderland, marking the first time they have occupied the drop zone in this season. Under ne...

item.title: Uma Bharti raises concern over railway station facilities after train delay incident
item.description: BJP leader and former Madhya Pradesh Chief Minister Uma Bharti recently faced an incident at Jhansi Railway Station where she almost missed the Punjab Mail train despite arriving on time. She reported...

item.title: DHSUD Announces Four-Day Work Schedule for April 2026 Due to Energy Crisis
item.description: The Department of Human Settlements and Urban Development (DHSUD) announced that it will be implementing a compressed workweek from April 13 to 17, 2026, in response to the ongoing energy crisis affec...

item.title: Living With an Ascending Testicle: A Personal Journey Through Childhood Trauma and Healing
item.description: Brad Snyder’s personal essay recounts his deeply vulnerable experience growing up with cryptorchidism, a condition where one or both testicles fail to descend properly. At age seven, a pediatrician di...

item.title: Daily Superquiz and Crossword Challenge for Monday 13 April
item.description: The article titled 'Superquiz, Monday, April 13' by Michelle Stillman is a short daily feature by The Age aimed at readers who enjoy puzzles and mental challenges. It invites users to participate in t...
